cf51f592bee1.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
cf51f592bee1.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
cf51f592bee1.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

0cf07aab89a0.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
0cf07aab89a0.description: At 3.3/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
0cf07aab89a0.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

ef2ed0b942cd.title: Close the hygiene gap — 2 to 5
ef2ed0b942cd.description: An FSA rating of 2 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
ef2ed0b942cd.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

7226cc4e3616.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
7226cc4e3616.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

8fd9a5021ef9.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
8fd9a5021ef9.description: At 148 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
